title.en: Processing of health care products - Information to be provided by the medical device manufacturer for the processing of medical devices - Part 1: Critical and semi-critical medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械的处理 - 由医疗器械制造商提供的可再处理医疗器械的处理信息 - 第1部分：关键和半关键医疗器械

standards.abstract: Specifies information to be provided by medical device manufacturers for the processing (reprocessing) of re-usable devices.
standards.scope: Processing of health care products -- Information to be provided by the medical device manufacturer for the processing of medical devices -- Critical and semi-critical medical devices.

title.en: Processing of health care products - Information to be provided by the medical device manufacturer for the processing of medical devices - Part 2: Non-critical medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械的处理 - 由医疗器械制造商提供的可再处理医疗器械的处理信息 - 第2部分：非关键医疗器械

standards.abstract: Specifies validation methods for reprocessing procedures of re-usable medical devices.
standards.scope: Processing of health care products -- Information to be provided by the medical device manufacturer for the processing of medical devices -- Non-critical medical devices.

title.en: Washer-disinfectors - Part 1: General requirements, terms and definitions and tests (ISO 15883-1:2024)
